description: 解码失败的 poison 消息(非 JSON / 无法反序列化为 TaskDispatchMessage)→ 跳过并 commit offset 前移,避免一条损坏字节永久 head-of-line 阻塞分区。区别于 schema-reject(18)/ paused(28)/ foreign-tenant 的 drop-message(不提交、可重投):那些是有效但当前不可消费的消息,重投有意义;decode-error 是不可恢复的损坏数据,重投只会重败,必须 commit-skip。§A 只约束 schemaVersion,不覆盖 decode;本 fixture 钉死 decode 的 offset 语义,统一五语言(此前 Java/Python commit-skip、Go/TS withhold 分歧)。Rust 薄档引擎只收已解析记录,解码由租户 adapter 负责,本条对其 N/A。

then.sdkExpectedAction: skip an undecodable (non-JSON / malformed) dispatch record AND commit its offset so the partition advances past the poison record
sdkMustNot: withhold the offset for an undecodable record (one corrupt message would permanently head-of-line block the partition)
dispatch a malformed message to a handler
crash the poll loop on a decode error
